creator: shamaz.mazum@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #56)

You do emphasize Epiphany. Does it mean that you have MiniBrowser from webkitgtk distribution working?

I wanted to share how I solved my problem with ProcessLauncherGlib (it may be useful for others), that's all

Oh, I forgot one thing. When you get your webkit working on gtk3, you may need this in .login:

setenv WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER 1

otherwise UI may freeze from time to time. On gtk4 you don't need this hack.
